extraction.one_line_summary: MOLEMAN Bauke attacked on descent after final categorized climb, soloed to victory by 1+ minute over chasers while Guillaume MARTIN's GC group time loss elevated him to 2nd overall.
tactical_patterns: EF Education Nippo controlled break tempo to protect Guillaume MARTIN's 5-minute cushion for GC podium advancement.
MOLEMAN attacked immediately after final KOM summit on descent, exploiting gap psychology when chase believed stage was decided.
Breakaway required 100+ kilometers to establish due to polkadot jersey battle between QUINTANA and WOODS complicating early dynamics.

rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: positive: rode breakaway tempo control to leapfrog URAN into 2nd GC, showing EF willing to sacrifice stage win for podium positioning
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: crashed mid-stage chasing back yet still contested KOM points aggressively enough to take polkadot jersey lead
rider_signals.MOLEMAN Bauke: positive: recognized psychological moment when chasers relaxed post-climb, attacked descent rather than waiting for finale sprint
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: lost GC podium spot to MARTIN without appearing in break or mounting defense, passive race management
